mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM TBL_COM_FAILCODE
FAILCDNM LIKE #{search}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COM_FAILCODE ( FAILCD, PAR_FAILCD, FAILCDNM, FAILTYPE, USEYN, REMARK, REGUSERID, REGDTM, EDITUSERID, EDITDTM ) VALUES ( #{FAILCD}, #{PAR_FAILCD}, #{FAILCDNM}, #{FAILTYPE}, #{USEYN}, #{REMARK}, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE(), #{EDITUSERID}, GETDATE() )
mapper.delete: UPDATE TBL_COM_FAILCODE SET USEYN = 0, EDITDTM = GETDATE() WHERE FAILCD = #{FAILCD}
